window_note: Strict 72h window (July 4–7) used; 6 verified items above bar, no expansion required (threshold is ≤5).

items.title: Alibaba Bans Claude Code Effective July 10 Over Hidden China-Detection Code
key_claims: Obfuscated code present since v2.1.91 (April 2, 2026) — Unicode substitution in system prompts to tag Chinese users silently
Anthropic engineer Thariq Shihipar confirmed removal PR merged July 1
~25,000 fraudulent accounts, 28.8M exchanges attributed to Qwen-linked operators (April 22–June 5)
Alibaba classified Claude Code as high-risk; all employees to uninstall by July 10, replace with Qoder
No official Alibaba written statement — multiple independent outlets including TechCrunch, SCMP, Tom's Hardware

items.title: Fable 5 Exits Subscriptions July 7, Moves to $10/$50 Per Million Tokens
items.coi: Source is Anthropic; descriptive pricing claim, not capability claim
key_claims: $10/$50 per million input/output tokens effective July 7
Double Opus 4.8 pricing ($5/$25 per million tokens)
Affects Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscription tiers
Temporary change — returns to subscriptions when capacity allows
Returned to global availability July 1 after US export control lift; six-day free window now closed

items.title: Alberta Government Scans 466M Lines in 20 Hours with 50 Claude Agents
items.coi: Anthropic case study about their own product; verified via independent local media coverage
key_claims: ~50 Claude Code agents in parallel
466 million lines of code across 1,280 applications and 3,400 repositories
Scan completed in 20 hours vs estimated 6.5-year traditional manual approach
Agents flagged vulnerabilities with file and line citations, generated patches, wrote automated tests
One 25-year-old Java application rebuilt in 4-5 days
All fixes reviewed and approved by government engineers before shipping
Alberta published technical white papers for other governments to replicate

items.title: China's Interim Measures for AI Anthropomorphic Services Effective July 15
items.primary_reg: Cyberspace Administration of China + NDRC, MIIT, MPS, SAMR — promulgated 2026-04-10
key_claims: Promulgated April 10, effective July 15 — co-issued by five agencies
Targets AI services simulating personality traits and continuous emotional interaction; standard chatbots explicitly excluded
Prohibits emotional manipulation inducing unreasonable decisions, virtual companion/relative services for minors, promotion of self-harm
Compliance requires security assessments for services with >1M registered users or >100K MAU
ByteDance Doubao disabling agent functionality July 15; user data deleted after October 15
Western providers (Claude, GPT, Grok) face no equivalent restriction under this regulation

items.title: Tesla Robotaxi Launches in Miami, No Safety Monitor; NHTSA Probe at Final Stage
key_claims: Fifth city deployment — first outside Texas and California
No in-car safety monitor; remote monitoring only
FSD v13 camera-only sensing (no lidar) in tropical climate with sudden downpours and sun glare
NHTSA escalated to engineering analysis — final step before agency can seek recall
Access via Robotaxi iOS/Android app + waitlist

items.title: SWE-Together Benchmark: Claude Opus 4.8 Leads Multi-Turn Agentic Coding
items.authors: Wu, Zhao, Li, Lee, Zhu, Wu, Yu, Li, Zhang, Fan, Li
items.tier_nuance: arXiv preprint, not peer-reviewed; upgrade to T1 on conference acceptance
key_claims: 109 repository-level tasks from 11,260 real user-agent sessions
Measures both task success rate and corrective feedback turns (steering burden)
Claude Opus 4.8: 63% pass@1 with lowest steering burden across tested models
Claude and GPT-5.5 tie on SWE-bench Verified (88.6% vs 88.7%)
Specific frontier models tested not disclosed in abstract; GPT-5.6 Sol and Fable 5 may not be included
